c.d: The total number of movies and TV shows available on the platform.
The availability and quality of exclusive movies and series produced by the platform.
The monthly or annual fee required to access the platform's content.
Whether the platform offers free content supported by advertisements.
The range of devices (e.g., smartphones, smart TVs, streaming devices) that support the platform's app.
The ease of navigation, search functionality, and overall user experience of the app.
The maximum video resolution and audio quality offered by the platform.
Availability of downloading content for offline viewing.
Availability of live television channels or live events streaming.
Regions or countries where the platform is accessible.
